module.name: formula
module.description: A named formula card — title, the big centered formula, and an optional "where" legend of the variables. Body: LaTeX, then optionally `---` and the legend.
module.aiSpec:
A named FORMULA CARD — a titled box holding the formula shown large, with an optional legend that explains each symbol.
Body: the LaTeX of the formula (no \[ \] — the module adds them). To add a legend, put a line containing only `---` after the formula, then a Markdown list of entries like `\(symbol\) — meaning`.
When NOT to use: for a bare numbered equation use @equation; for inline math write \( ... \) directly.
Parameters: - `name` : the card title shown in the header bar. Default blank (no header). - `color` : accent for the header, border and legend tint. Default var(--accent-color). - `align` : left | center | right — alignment of the formula. Default center. - `size` : small | normal | large — size of the displayed formula. Default normal. - `variant` : filled | outline — filled = solid colored header (default); outline = transparent header with colored title text. - `radius` : card corner radius in px. Default 10. Range 0–40.
<!-- @formula name: Quadratic formula, variant: outline --> x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a} --- - \(a, b, c\) — coefficients (\(a \ne 0\)) - \(x\) — the roots <!-- @end -->

param.name: name
param.label: Formula name
param.desc: Card title shown in the header bar; blank = no header.

param.name: color
param.label: Accent color
param.desc: Header, border and legend tint color.

param.name: variant
param.label: Header style
param.desc: filled = solid colored header; outline = transparent with colored title.

snippet.label: Formula card
snippet.text: <!-- @formula name: Quadratic formula --> x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a} --- - \(a, b, c\) — coefficients (\(a \ne 0\)) - \(x\) — the two roots <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Titled formula card with an optional "where" legend after ---.
